## What & why

<!-- Which skill(s) added or changed, and the reason. -->

## Skill(s) touched

- [ ] `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`

## Accuracy (this repo's bar)

Skills must reflect the **current** framework, verified against source — not assumptions or another app's conventions.

- [ ] Claims/method signatures verified against `glueful/framework` `src/` (note the version if version-sensitive).
- [ ] No hallucinated/Laravel-style APIs; framework idioms only (`ApplicationContext`-first, etc.).
- [ ] Examples use a **generic** domain (e.g. `Article`/`Widget`), not a specific product's names.
- [ ] Valid YAML frontmatter (`name` + `description`); description has no unquoted `: ` colon-space.
- [ ] Cross-checked for overlap with existing skills; descriptions stay distinct (so the right skill auto-loads).

## Verification

<!-- How you confirmed it: files grepped, behavior checked, commands run. -->
